context.description:
## Problem
The PMM bot accumulated $227 in directional positions, exhausted all free capital, and died. Nobody detected it needed relaunching. The bot has no logic to:
1. Detect when a market becomes unfavorable (high spread, low volume, directional inventory)
2. Close positions and free capital automatically
3. Migrate to a better market

## Solution: 3 new modules in runner/

### A. Market Health Monitor (`runner/market_health.py`)
- Track per-market metrics: spread, volume, fill_rate, invento

spawn_params.title: PMM: Market Rotation + Capital Recovery (auto-reallocation)
spawn_params.description:
## Problem

1. Detect when a market becomes unfavorable (high spread, low volume, directional inventory)
2. Close positions and free capital automatically
